ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g. Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday (e.g. New Year's Day, Christmas Day) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g. Clear, Cloudy, Rainy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the rental station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the rental station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the rental station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the rental station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_station_data" (
  "rental_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental station record */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding rental record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental station */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the rental */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of rentals at the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "available_docks" INTEGER /* Number of available docks at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_station_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES rental_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_categories" (
  "temperature_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature category */,
  "temperature_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature category (e.g. low, medium, high) */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the category */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_categories" (
  "humidity_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity category */,
  "humidity_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the humidity category (e.g. low, medium, high) */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity for the category */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data source */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data quality assessment */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (e.g. 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
